Is this a problem tonight?So?I understand the frustration, however, it is written down with how it is supposed to go. The time, from our point, is not a confirmed time.
The Options for this match are the following:

- You guys try to reschedule to either tomorrow or sunday. If it doesn't happen, it gets judged based on 2.13.
- 「 ✦ Right Click ✦ 」 can be nice and forfeit (at the end of the day, they didn't show up to a supposed confirmed match. They are not obligated to)
- You guys forfeit.

Those are the only options we can go from here.Let's postpone it until Sunday ?Mike il Pazzo He's been texting for me for the match days and times for 3 weeks now. Is this a problem tonight?We are handling everything based on a "Act if called basis". We don't act and let teams handle the matches, however if enforcement is needed, we need the matches to proceed as procedure dictates. Thats the difference between Section 2 and Section 3.
Section 2 are our procedures. The "If called like the police" basis. For us to enforce, it has to go the way as outlined. If it works another way for you, we dont prohibit it, but you risk not getting a procedure enforced (like it happens now).
If it goes well, great. If it doesn't, you bleed.

Section 3 are the actual rules that HAVE TO BE abided by, fully mandated, in our League. These are strict "Don't do this, else you get a penalty."Let's postpone it until Sunday ?NoAs we told you several timesSo now we've basically lost the match because we're not there on Saturday and Sunday?Hello! We are available from Tuesday (today) to Friday, from 9:30 PM to 12:00 AM CET!.Sorry for the pressure, but we won’t be available on Saturday and Sunday. Can we decide as soon as possible when to play?.Could it be postponed to next week?So now we've basically lost the match because we're not there on Saturday and Sunday?While the confirmation from Diamante has no weight, his messages in general still do.
The messages are not ignored in the Communicative effort evaluation.
(There are some things we have to change, ngl. Next season they will be fixed/adjusted.)

*I think the nicest thing would be if Badoooo forfeits this match. From the rule-side our hands are tied. I do understand 「 ✦ Right Click ✦ 」s side of the story aswell tho. You hold yourself to the Procedures and get "punishment" for it? Doesnt make sense either. I can't do anything about this situation. I already said what the options are for this match right now. Everyone gets treated the very same, the rules and procedures get enforced based on the very same basis, that basis being: How it's written down. 「 ✦ Right Click ✦ 」 felt that Against Fenix Esports, which costed them the win in one of their two matches against them. *

However, I do understand your point Kitammorten ²⁰ on the whole situation as well. It isn't like I don't understand and don't act. I don't act now because I see nothing I can act upon based on the rules presented. There need to be changes, but just because there need to be changes doesn't mean I can just overrule the previous decisions and make an exception here. That would harbour a basis of an unfair base-line. It might not be fair against your team in your eyes, but it is extremely unfair to all the other teams that got handed the same decision during the season. Rule-changes come per season, so the whole season is run under the same base-line: same rules, same decisions, same treatment, to make it as equal as possible. No out of hand not-understandable decisions because "Staff felt like it" that day. I hope you guys understand 「 ✦ Aeterna Dragons ✦ 」.

We got the Time suggestion at 23:00 CET. That can counted as a confirmation if the reply after is timely to it. Important to note:
- You didnt phrase it like "we most likely can play on sunday, 23:00 CET.". The "most likely" does not make it a definitive confirmation.

The rest doesn't interest me.Yeah, i totally get that It's always a tough thing to balance freedom with rules and procedures. Thats why we chose the "call if procedure is breached and you want enforcement". If it works without our procedure, great. If it doesnt work without our procedure, our hands are tied.oh yeah, last thing on that topic:
Risk and reward.

- High risk, high reward
If it goes your way, it works and everything goes your way with no problem. You play on your time, with your communication style and how ever you like. However, if you fall, you fall hard.

- Low risk, medium reward
You play by how it's written down, hold yourself to the rules and have the ability to punish the other teams that want to not communicate properly or communicate how it's written down. It is more work than other styles, but it is more proper. If you fall, it's less likely your fault. If something happens, it's one of the "cracks" that we still have to discuss and need to fix.

You chose a mix between both.
You wanted procedure enforced but you couldn't have it enforced, because you or GiMalte didn't confirm (which is you falling down)
You didn't have to in previous matches, because everything went well. (high reward)

I just want to make sure you atleast understand, that i'm not giving preferential treatment to Right Click.
